entries.title: Phase 0 — portfolio + coach SOPs
entries.why: Establish single canonical workspace, continuity pointer, and confirmation-gate protocol before parallel lane build.

entries.title: Wave 1 Phase 1 — goal-log + ops manuals
entries.why: Give team and AI coaches a shared execution log and operating manuals without relying on chat memory.

entries.title: Split lane prompts
entries.why: Enable five parallel AI chats with one file per lane; reduce copy-paste errors.

entries.title: src/contracts Pydantic models
entries.why: Lock Layer-0 JSON shapes from LOCKED_STATE §4 so lanes communicate without reaching into internals.

entries.title: Research Phases 3–6
entries.why: Close judge-narrative gaps: Databricks mapping, data landscape, ROI defensibility, architecture lock.

entries.title: Horizon automation scaffolds
entries.why: Prepare Drive export, MLflow tracking, session skill, and Notion/Drive sync stubs for later waves.

entries.title: v1 demo polish — deferred
entries.why: User confirmed v1 code is not production-ready; focus on spine (ops, contracts, research, lanes) first.
entries.roadmap_delta: NOW demo smoke + NEXT dashboard port → DEFERRED
entries.notes: Known issues: FORGE imports, RUL snapshot at end-of-life, run_demo.py kwargs. Revisit before hackathon freeze.
